description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a flat roof and a spacious, landscaped yard. The front features a wide driveway leading to a carport, a central staircase, and a covered porch with columns. The rear of the house opens onto an expansive deck with outdoor seating and a pergola, ideal for gatherings. The property is surrounded by a low fence and includes manicured lawns, flower beds, and blossoming trees. Large, evenly spaced windows line both floors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on symmetry and outdoor living spaces.
description: A spacious two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped yard, and a wide deck with outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the deck with pergola, outdoor seating, and a section of the landscaped backyard with trees and garden beds.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway with steps, columns, a car parked in the driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the carport, driveway, and more of the backyard with blossoming trees and garden features.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the large deck, pergola, outdoor dining area, and the back entrance to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central staircase with wide steps, covered porch supported by columns, and a prominent main door flanked by windows.
